name: Count and Measure Particles in Microscopy Image
description: Perform particle analysis on the 'blobs' sample image in Fiji. Threshold the image to binary and ensure particles are represented as white objects on a black background. Run the particle analysis using a size filter of 10-Infinity pixels and a circularity range of 0.00-1.00. Save the measurement results to ~/ImageJ_Data/results/Results.csv and the summary statistics to ~/ImageJ_Data/results/Summary.csv. Report the total particle count and the average particle area (Average Size) from the summary data.
